# E2E Ticket Context Extractor Worker

Internal requirements-extraction skill for E2E planning workflows.

## When to Use This Skill

- Coordinator needs normalized requirements from Jira/Confluence
- Acceptance criteria must be translated into journey-ready inputs

## Output Highlights

- Actors, goals, acceptance criteria
- Journeys and constraints
- Assumptions and open questions

## Constraints

- Evidence-only extraction
- No invented requirements
